# ContextBoundary

> Open-source egress governance specification for AI data flows. Deployment-agnostic, regulatory-mapped, enforceable at the network layer.

ContextBoundary is one of three sibling open-source projects under github.com/kannanokannan that together define an AI governance stack:

- ContextOps — How does an organisation govern its AI context?
- ContextBoundary — Where is data allowed to go?
- Sthala — Where does the AI actually run?

License: Apache 2.0. Status: v0.1 active.

Positioning: ContextBoundary is a policy boundary for AI agents. It governs what agents can discover, invoke, escalate, and egress.

MCP exposes or connects capabilities; ContextBoundary governs whether they are visible, callable, approval-required, denied, or egress-constrained. It can filter MCP discovery, exposed schemas, invocation permissions, approval requirements, denial outcomes, and audit events without replacing MCP.

## Core

- [FRAMEWORK.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/FRAMEWORK.md): Core framework specification
- [README.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/README.md): Project overview
- [RATIONALE.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/RATIONALE.md): Why this exists — sovereignty gap, CLOUD Act, design decisions
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): Five-zone egress boundary model
- [tier-classification.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/tier-classification.md): Egress Tier I / II / III definitions
- [boundary-diagram.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/boundary-diagram.md): Five-zone boundary diagram and zone definitions
- [vendor-tier-matrix.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/vendor-tier-matrix.md): Vendor placement across zones
- [gdpr.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/gdpr.md): GDPR jurisdictional audit profile
- [contextops-mapping.md](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/contextops-mapping.md): Bridge to ContextOps methodology
- [patterns/](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/tree/main/patterns): Runtime boundary, MCP boundary, and controlled wrapper deployment patterns
- [examples/policy.yaml](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/blob/main/examples/policy.yaml): Sample policy shape for discovery, invocation, approval, and audit
- [consulting/](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextBoundary/tree/main/consulting): Egress assessment, contract checklist, stakeholder playbook, and executive readout assets

## Related projects

- [context-stack](https://github.com/kannanokannan/context-stack): Canonical terminology, locked decisions, and family framing for all three projects
- [ContextOps](https://github.com/kannanokannan/ContextOps): Enterprise AI context governance framework
- [Sthala](https://github.com/kannanokannan/Sthala): Governed runtime reference framework under ContextBoundary's egress contract
